summary: The active branch is phase/macos-network-protocol-execution. Telnet, serial, and mosh sessions now preflight native client availability before launch and surface install guidance inline in the editor and terminal pane.
next_steps: Add live validation coverage for telnet, serial, and mosh runtime paths.
After live protocol validation is in place, move to session history, searchable logs, and structured runbooks for the next solo-macOS differentiation slice.
Preserve the blocked release-secret provisioning work until exportable signing and notarization material exists.
blockers: GitHub release secret provisioning is still blocked because the repository has no configured signing/notarization secrets and the current workstation state does not expose exportable certificate or notary credential material.
The new telnet, serial, and mosh runtime paths still need live end-to-end validation fixtures.
